Core Capabilities

Built for the Modern Supply Chain

End-to-end visibility, intelligent prediction, adaptive routing — all free.

Real-Time Tracking

Live shipment visibility across every node with sub-second precision and anomaly detection.

✓ Free — WebSocket Live

Predictive Analytics

ML models trained on 10M+ routes predict delay probability 4h before issues escalate.

✓ Free — 92% Accuracy

Dynamic Rerouting

Automated alternative route suggestions triggered by weather, traffic, and risk signals in real time.

✓ Free — Sub-40ms

Instant Alerts

Multi-channel notifications — push, email, SMS, Slack — the moment disruption is detected.

✓ Free — Omnichannel

Analytics Dashboard

Comprehensive KPIs with drill-down charts turning raw logistics data into actionable intelligence.

✓ Free — Live Charts

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 Type II certified with end-to-end encryption and RBAC across all touchpoints.

✓ Free — SOC 2

AI Route Optimizer

AI co-pilot suggests optimal multi-modal routing based on cost, speed, and carbon footprint.

✓ Free — AI Powered

Ocean Intelligence

Real-time sea state monitoring, port congestion scoring, and canal waiting-time predictions.

✓ Free — 900+ Ports

API & Integrations

REST and WebSocket APIs with native connectors for SAP, Oracle TMS, Salesforce, and 40+ platforms.

✓ Free — 40+ Integrations

AI Risk Engine · Free

Predictive Risk Intelligence

Live ML-powered risk scoring across all active routes, updated every 30 seconds.

Route Risk Scores

Live · 30s refresh
Mumbai → Rotterdam (Sea)64%
Shanghai → LA (Sea)81%
Dubai → Nairobi (Air)18%
Hamburg → New York (Sea)47%
Singapore → Sydney (Sea)22%

AI Insights

🤖 AI Engine
🌊
Typhoon Karin — Intensifying near Philippines. Routes via South China Sea face +18h delay risk. Indonesian archipelago bypass recommended.
🚧
Suez Canal congestion — 34 vessels waiting. +6h overhead estimated. Cape of Good Hope bypass adds 4 days but eliminates risk.
📈
Freight index spike — Trans-Pacific spot rates up 22% this week. Lock in forward contracts before Thursday's market open.
✅
Indian coastal corridor — Clear conditions predicted for 72h. Optimal window for West-to-East coast transfers.
81% Risk score high
30s Update interval
